profile.subtitle: Lantern-Festival Bubble Shooter
profile.alt: Moon Lit — paper lanterns drifting up through bamboo toward a full moon over a still river
profile.descLead: Send paper lanterns up to the trellis.
profile.descBody: A boatman launches glowing lanterns into a hex grid; match three or more of a color to clear them and drop the chains hanging beneath. The trellis presses down every six shots — clear it before the lanterns cross the dead-line.
profile.kicker: Lantern festival under a moonlit sky.

profile.subtitle: Memorization Gauntlet
profile.alt: Pi Game — cascading digits of pi in a retro arcade style
profile.descLead: One wrong digit and it's over.
profile.descBody: Tap digits of Pi on a number pad — every correct digit extends your streak. A single mistake ends it. Synthesized audio rises in pitch as you climb, particles explode across the screen, and the pressure never stops. 4 visual themes. Works offline.
profile.kicker: Simple to learn. Impossible to master.

profile.name: Silicon Syndicate
profile.subtitle: Assembly Logic Puzzle
profile.alt: Silicon Syndicate — glowing circuit board traces with microcontroller chips
profile.descLead: Program microcontrollers. Route signals. Hack the system.
profile.descBody: Write tiny assembly programs using mov, add, tgt, slp, and jmp. Wire sensors, MCUs, and outputs on an interactive circuit board. Match the target waveform to advance.
profile.kicker: No install. No backend. Runs entirely in your browser.

profile.subtitle: Hexagonal Puzzle
profile.alt: HecknSic — colorful hexagonal puzzle grid with neon glow
profile.descBody: Rotate clusters of colorful hexagons to form matches of three or more. Chain combos for exponential score multipliers. Trigger Stars, Flowers, and Bombs for explosive results.

profile.name: Cozy Solitaire
profile.subtitle: Grandma-Approved Card Games
profile.alt: Cozy Solitaire — warm cabin scene with playing cards by the fireplace
profile.descBody: Three classic variants — Klondike, FreeCell, and Spider — rendered on HTML5 Canvas with warm browns, soft greens, and cabin vibes. Unlimited undo, auto-complete, drag-and-drop, and statistics tracking.

profile.subtitle: A Cozy Logic Puzzle
profile.alt: Sowdoku — a grid of soft watercolor pens with little napping piggies
profile.descLead: Give every little piggy its own patch of mud.
profile.descBody: A Queens-style logic puzzle: one piggy per row, column, and color pen — and never two touching. Uniquely-solvable boards from 6×6 to 9×9, soothing watercolor pens, gentle hearts, and a wooden-thud tactile feel. No timers, no grind.
profile.kicker: Made with ☕ and absolute personal space.

profile.subtitle: Multiplayer Messaging
profile.alt: P2P Chat — a chat bubble icon on a dark gradient background
profile.descLead: No server, no accounts — just a direct link between devices.
profile.descBody: Pair over the arcade's Multiplayer menu and chat, share files, and form group threads directly over WebRTC. Tabs are yours to rename, and group chats have real synced membership you control.
profile.kicker: Proves out the arcade's own multiplayer framework.
